nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1941; const int b = 2173; const int c = 2238; const int d = 2285; const int e = 2325; const int f = 2361; const int g = 2395; const int h = 2427; const int i = 2460; const int j = 2494; const int k = 2530; const int l = 2570; const int m = 2617; const int n = 2681; const int o = 2914;
